notes: THE HERMIT visitors. SCAFFOLD — three visitors with the canonical waiter sequence; per-visitor step flavor is placeholder.

visitors.name: The Previous Keeper
visitors.lore_text: You see The Previous Keeper. (THE HERMIT beat — refine.)
pre_arrival_hints: You sense the previous keeper is near.
Steps. Or breath. Or the room shifting.

steps.greet: You meet eyes with The Previous Keeper. The room registers it.
steps.listen: The Previous Keeper tells you what they came to tell you.
steps.deliver: You give The Previous Keeper what they were after.
steps.sit_with: The Previous Keeper stays for a beat. You stay back.
